title: Infinitely Vanilla
description: A light client built for completely vanilla servers.
body:
**Infinitely Vanilla** is a lightweight vanilla modpack. It aims to:
- look good with Distant Horizons (as soon as its released) and Rethinking Voxels
- be used in any minecraft server, complying with 90% of servers' mod rules. 
- retain compatibility with optional server-side features (i.e. Simple Voice Chat)
- enhance the game experience 
- benefit the player with quality-of-life features
- promote accessibility through controller support

# Key Mods
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Baseline performance improvements
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) - Easily sort your inventory and storage and replace broken tools and armor pieces
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Expand your view distance beyond the server's.
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - Built-in voice chat with compatible servers
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - Improves chunk performance
